snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - drop dead (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
"drop dead" out now: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/dropdead

Presave 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' out on June 12th: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove
Shop the collection: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store


Directed by Petra Collins
Shot in The Palace of Versailles

Follow Olivia Rodrigo:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo
Twitter: https://x.com/oliviarodrigo
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy3zgWom-5AGypGX_FVTKpg
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/livieshq

Follow Palace of Versailles:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chateauversailles/
Twitter: https://x.com/CVersailles
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@chateauversailles
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/chateauversailles
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/chateauversailles


Lyrics

I know that the bar closes at 11
I hope you never finish that beer
You know all the words to “Just Like Heaven”
And I know why he wrote them
Now that you’re standing right here

Ohh
One night I was bored in bed
And stalked you on the internet
It’s feminine intuition
‘Cuz I always had a vision of us standing like this
All pressed up in the bathroom line
You’re looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles
The most alive I’ve ever been
But kiss me and I might drop dead

And I feel like I might throw up
Left hook, right punch to the gut
You’re so so pretty boy
I’m paranoid I made you up
Yeah I’d love it if you walked me home
If you promised we could go real slow
‘Cuz I got chewing gum
And a bunch of stuff I’d like to know
Like, have you ever been to Japan?
Or taken that Eurostar to France?
I’ve been dropping hints all night
That I’d love it if you held my hand, goddamn
And then maybe we could make-makeout
Clothes off and fall to the ground
Let’s go steady
Let’s go out
And tell the whole damn world how

One night I was bored in bed
And stalked you on the internet
It’s feminine intuition
‘Cuz I always had a vision of us standing like this
All pressed up in the bathroom line
You’re looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles
The most alive I’ve ever been
But kiss me and I might

Pisces and a Gemini
But I think we might go really nice together
If you let me stay the night
Well I think I might just have to stay forever

Pisces and a Gemini
But I think we might go really nice together
If you let me stay the night
Well I think I might just have to stay forever

Ohh
One night I was bored in bed
And stalked you on the internet
It’s feminine intuition
‘Cuz I always had a vision of us standing like this
All pressed up in the bathroom line
You’re looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles
The most alive I’ve ever been
But kiss me and I might
Kiss me and I might
Kiss me and I might drop dead


#OliviaRodrigo #dropdead #youseemprettysadforagirlsoinlove

✨ มนต์เพลงยุค 90 – รวมบทเพลงไทยยุค 90 ที่คิดถึง 🎶🇹🇭
ยินดีต้อนรับสู่พื้นที่เสียงเพลงแห่งความทรงจำ ที่ซึ่งบทเพลงไทยยุค 90 จะกลับมามีชีวิตอีกครั้ง

🎧 เนื้อหาในวิดีโอ:
• รวมเพลงไทยยุค 90 เพลงดังในตำนาน
• แนว Pop – Rock – Ballad – ลูกทุ่ง – ลูกกรุง
• ฟังสบาย ผ่อนคลาย ใช้ขณะทำงานหรือนอนหลับ

❤️ ขอบคุณที่รับฟังและสนับสนุนช่อง ✨

snippet.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | First Look Teaser
snippet.description:
GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki
In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. Additionally confirmed out of CinemaCon, Ryunosuke Kamiki, the hero who faced Godzilla’s terror in Godzilla Minus One, returns as Koichi Shikishima, and is joined by Minami Hamabe as Noriko Oishi, who miraculously survived Godzilla’s first attack on Tokyo.

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO in a true cinematic event not to be missed.

🎤 Lyrics for "Westlife - My Love"

An empty street, an empty house
A hole inside my heart
I'm all alone, the rooms are getting smaller

I wonder how, I wonder why
I wonder where they are
The days we had, the songs we sang together
Oh yeah

And oh, my love
I'm holding on forever
Reaching for the love that seems so far

So I say a little prayer
And hope my dreams will take me there
Where the skies are blue
To see you once again, my love
Overseas from coast to coast
To find a place I love the most
Where the fields are green
To see you once again, my love

I try to read, I go to work
I'm laughing with my friends
But I can't stop, to keep myself from thinking, oh no

I wonder how, I wonder why
I wonder where they are
The days we had the songs, we sang together
Oh yeah

And oh, my love
I'm holding on forever
Reaching for the love that seems so far

So I say a little prayer
And hope my dreams will take me there

snippet.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
snippet.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces Earth’s mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as Doom’s influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of Marvel’s most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial

These mashups often depict a movie that doesn’t exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. § 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the film’s genre entirely.

snippet.title: จะรอดหรือร่วง! เอาชีวิตรอด 100 วัน Minecraft Hardcore 1.21.11
snippet.description:
ในคลิปนี้เราจะมาเอาชีวิตรอดในเวอร์ชัน 1.21.11 กัน ซึ่งมีการอัพเดทหลายอย่างมากมายไม่ว่าจะเป็นอาวุธชนิดใหม่อย่างหอก หรือยานพาหนะเดินทางในน้ำอย่างหอยงวงช้าง รวมถึงน้องอูฐสีใหม่ แต่ไม่ใช่แค่นั้นยังมีตัวอันตรายอย่างโครงกระดูกทะเลทรายหรือแม้แต่มอนเตอร์ที่มีโอกาสถือหอกไล่จิ้มทิ่มแทงได้ทุกเมื่อ ดูกันว่าผมจะสามารถมีชีวิตรอดจนครบ 100 วันในโหมดฮาร์ดคอได้หรือไม่ มาร่วมให้กำลังใจและผจญภัยไปพร้อมกันเลย

snippet.title: Metro 2039 - Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
snippet.description:
Wishlist METRO 2039  
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10009337

Journey into the dark heart of the Metro  

METRO 2039 takes you to the dark heart of the Moscow Metro where the last survivors of the nuclear apocalypse cling to existence in the tunnels and subways of the ruined city, hope is lost… the future looks bleak... if there is one.  

Sign up for the latest news delivered to your inbox so you don’t miss out on the latest METRO roundups. 

We are thrilled to officially unveil the next mainline METRO title from 4A Games  - METRO 2039, coming to PlayStation 5 this winter. 

Join us on our darkest journey yet, as our protagonist – “The Stranger” hurtles through a loop of a never-ending nightmare, never certain of what is real.  Watch until the end for heart-pounding in-engine gameplay and cinematics from METRO 2039. 

Keep your radios tuned to the official METRO social media channels and newsletter for more updates, trailers and news. Follow us here on YouTube for the latest video content. 

#ps5 #ps5games #Metro2039 #4AGames #DeepSilver

snippet.title: Tame Impala - Dracula (JENNIE Remix) (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
╰┈➤ Dive into the lyrics of “Dracula” — a space where every word feels like it was written just for you.
Here, music is more than sound — it’s memories, emotions, and little moments that stay with us.

Tame Impala - Dracula (JENNIE Remix) (Lyrics) ▶︎ •၊၊||၊|။||||။၊|• 3:40
#TameImpalaJENNIE

╰┈➤ On this channel, you’ll find songs that feel straight out of an indie film: timeless classics and hidden gems waiting to become your new favorites.

If this song kept you company today:
💌 Share it with someone who needs it
⭐ Subscribe and keep this little corner saved for whenever you want to come back
🫰 Leave a comment telling us which song moves your heart

⤷ ゛follow Tame Impalaˎˊ˗

｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡

Lyrics:
[Intro: Tame Impala & JENNIE]
Oh (You and me)
Oh (Hahaha)
(Check it out now)
(Hahaha, mm)
(Dracula)
(Ba-da-bing, ba-da-boom)
(Dracula)

[Verse 1: Tame Impala, JENNIE, Tame Impala & JENNIE]
The morning light is turning blue, the feeling is bizarre (Bizarre)
The night is almost over, I still don't know where you are
The shadows, yeah, they keep me pretty like a movie star
Daylight makes me feel like Dracula (Dracula)

[Refrain: Tame Impala & JENNIE]
In the end, I hope it's you and me (You and me)
In the darkness, I would never leave (Never leave)
You won't ever see me in the light of day
It's far too late, the time has come

[Verse 2: Tame Impala, JENNIE, Tame Impala & JENNIE]
I'm on the verge of caving in, I run back to the dark (Dark)
Now I'm Mr. Charisma, fuckin' Pablo Escobar
My friends are saying, "Shut up, Jennie, just get in the car" (Hahaha; Jennie)
I just wanna be right where you are (Oh, my love)

[Refrain: Tame Impala & JENNIE, JENNIE, Tame Impala]
In the end, I hope it's you and me (You and me)
In the darkness, I would never leave (Never leave; I won't leave her)
We both saw this moment comin' from afar (Comin' from afar)
Now here we are (Here we are)

[Chorus: JENNIE & Tame Impala]
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula (Run from the sun)
Isn't the view spectacular? (Dracula; Dracula)

[Verse 3: JENNIE & Tame Impala]
Hey, Kevin, what's up? (Haha)
Come pull up in my spot
Let's keep the night glowing
I don't ever wanna stop (Hahaha)
I'll never leave this floor, got me needin' more (Oh)
Sky is turning blue, let it clear the smoke
Lip-stain on the rim, bass is 'bout to blow (Oh)
Sinking in my teeth, I buy time

[Bridge: Tame Impala & JENNIE]
But please, do you think about what it might mean? (Mean)
'Cause I dream about you in my sleep
Would you ever love someone like me (Someone like me)
Like me? (Oh)


[Refrain: Tame Impala & JENNIE, JENNIE]
In the end, I hope it's you and me (Oh, my love)
In the darkness, I would never leave
We both saw this moment comin' from afar (Comin' from afar)
Now here we are (Here we are)

[Chorus: Tame Impala & JENNIE, Tame Impala, JENNIE]
So run from the sunlight, Dracula
So run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Isn't the view spectacular?
So run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Isn't the view spectacular? (Run from the sunlight, Dracula)
Run from the sunlight, Dracula (Run from the sunlight, Dracula)
Run from the sunlight, Dracula (Run from the sunlight, Dracula)
Isn't the view spectacular?
｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡

เนื้อเพลง

ใกล้ เกินกว่าที่จะพูดคำใดๆออกไป 
มันใกล้เกินกว่าจะมองเห็นใคร 
เมื่อเราใกล้จนอยากจะหยุดหายใจ 
มันใกล้จนมีแต่เธอกับฉันวันนี้เท่านั้น 

อาจเป็นเพราะว่าเธอบังเอิญได้เจอฉัน 
อาจเป็นเพราะว่าเราบังเอิญอยู่ด้วยกัน 
เพราะเธอยังไม่เคย ได้รู้มันเป็นยังไง 
และฉันไม่เคยเข้าใจ ถ้ามันต้องอยู่อย่างนั้น 
ถ้าเราไม่คุยกันสักครั้ง วันนี้ก็คงไม่มีใครเข้าใจ
